case_title: MCCLARIE, CHARMAINE vs. ENGLER, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, WILSON, GUY ALLAN (115309), ARB-5 MAILED
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 3/13/97
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLARIE, CHARMAINE SERVED OCT-02-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLER, STEVE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ENGLER, STEVE

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-02-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLES IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-03-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-02-1996 TO JAN-08-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1996, CONTINUED TO OCT-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY NO ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT AND REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER TO PAY SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT ENGLER, STEVE

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-08-1997, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON FEB-03-1997 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED; $150.00 SANCTIONS AGAINST PARTIES IS VACATED. APPEARANCE ON 1/8/97 IS WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION TO TRANSFER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLARIE, CHARMAINE HEARING SET FOR APR-23-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO TRANSFER, CALENDAR OF APR-23-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT & PAY TRANSFER FEES.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLARIE, CHARMAINE AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLER, STEVE DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-19-1996
ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-03-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
